metadata.description: A self-improving YouTube channel factory delivered as a reusable plugin — niche → brand → research → script → voice → motion → edit → distribute, optimized by a source-cited, test-over-time strategy library.

plugins.name: viewforge
plugins.description: Brainstorm a niche and brand, then research → plan → write → produce → edit → distribute fully-engaging motion-graphics videos end to end (no fake-human avatars). Optimization is driven by a research-backed, source-cited strategy library seeded from the MrBeast production memos, with anti-reward-hacking and anti-overfitting guards, organized as departments that measurably improve over time.
